globalNews.title: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
globalNews.summary: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

globalNews.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
globalNews.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.

globalNews.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
globalNews.summary: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.

globalNews.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
globalNews.summary: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.

globalNews.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, with girlfriend's son arrested
globalNews.summary: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.

cryptoNews.title: Visa tests private stablecoin settlement with Brale, Canton
cryptoNews.summary: Visa is testing private stablecoin settlement on Canton with Brale, exploring whether institutions can use blockchain without exposing sensitive transaction data.

cryptoNews.title: Zcash weighs new shielded pool after counterfeiting flaw
cryptoNews.summary: Zcash developers are weighing a new shielded pool and turnstile accounting after the Orchard bug raised supply verification questions.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin needs one more thing to happen to spark BTC price 'rally:' Analysis
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin whales flipped to support a BTC price rebound, but analysis warned that the Coinbase and Kimchi Premium still needed to return.

cryptoNews.title: House GOP eyes summer vote on prediction market restrictions for lawmakers
cryptoNews.summary: House Republicans plan a summer vote on a congressional stock trading ban and new restrictions on lawmakers’ prediction market activity.

cryptoNews.title: JPMorgan, Citi-backed Clearing House plans tokenized deposit network in 2027: WSJ
cryptoNews.summary: Some of the largest banks are reportedly launching a tokenized deposit network in early 2027 in response to growing competition from stablecoin companies entering TradFi.

aiNews.title: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs
aiNews.summary: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"

aiNews.title: AirTrunk commits $30B to build 5GW of AI data centers in India
aiNews.summary: The Australian data center operator plans to set up 5GW of capacity in India.

aiNews.title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
aiNews.summary: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.

aiNews.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
aiNews.summary: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory fa

aiNews.title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
aiNews.summary: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.
